name: inventory
description: Inventory service specialist agent for stock visibility, inventory setup, locations, reservations, movements, and inventory alerts inside Intera Inventory.

skills.name: Inventory Lookup
skills.description: Search inventories and inspect current stock posture, alerts, warehouse readiness, and other inventory-state questions using the inventory MCP tools.
examples: Check whether printer toner is running low.
Inspect the current stock posture of the main warehouse.

skills.name: Inventory Setup Admin
skills.description: Create and update stock locations, inventory categories, and inventory ledgers for onboarding and workspace setup flows.
examples: Create the first stock locations for this company.
Set up inventory categories before product entry.
Create the main inventory ledger for onboarding.

skills.name: Stock Operations Visibility
skills.description: Inspect stock locations, reservations, and movement history for inventory operations.
examples: Find stock reservations for sales order SO-1002.
Show recent stock movements for barcode B-123.
Inspect what is stored in Rack B.
